entities.name: FALL ARMY WORM
entities.description: Invasive pest Spodoptera frugiperda causing economic losses to maize, sorghum, and millets

entities.description: Crop affected by fall army worm and used as a component in artificial diets

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL DIET
entities.description: Cost-effective crop-based medium developed for rearing Spodoptera frugiperda

entities.description: Controlled environment used to evaluate the biology of the pest

entities.description: The duration from egg to adult stage of the insect
